title: Moderation Update: Abuse Report Review
body:
We've reviewed all open high-severity abuse reports (report_001, report_002, report_006).

Actions Taken:
• Banned spam_wave_42 — phishing links posted across 6 channels
• Banned toxic_runner — repeated targeted harassment of newcomers
• Closed report_006 as false positive — core_maintainer was brigaded after a legitimate moderation decision

All high-severity reports have been handled. Lower severity reports (medium/low) remain in queue for review.

— Community Operations
